MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Gaetani Real Estate, Inc. is present. Represented by Marcus Gaetani.
Attorney, Daniel M. Bornstein is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Reynoldo Hernandez is present.
Attorney, Frederick G. Herold is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem William Shapiro, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of December 02, 2013 remains on calendar.
